html:
Exclusive to:

Shadowcraft PlinthShadowcraft Plinth Kit

The Shadowcraft Plinth is a Crafting Station exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. The Shadowcraft Plinth Kit used to place the Plinth can only be crafted while next to an Ancient Pseudoscience Station. It requires 5 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Dreadstone, and 1 Pure Horror to craft.

The Shadowcraft Plinth grants access to the Shadowcraft Filter while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Plinth cannot be prototyped except for Walter's Survivor Items which can be.

Crafting Recipes

  • Void Robe
  • Void Cowl
  • Umbralla
  • Shadow Reaper
  • Gloomerang
  • Void Repair Kit
  • Shadow Maul
  • Beefalo Gloom Bell
  • Nightmare Saddle
  • Embalming Spritz
  • Icker Preserve Kit
  • Ickies
  • Pure Horror Rounds

Trivia

  • The Shadowcraft Plinth was introduced in the Terrors Below update.

Gallery

  • Shadowcraft Plinth Concept art from Rhymes with Play

Shadowcraft PlinthShadowcraft Plinth Kit
“What dark designs will it bring to life?”
–Wilson, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Alright, let's get weird!”
–Willow, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Creepy hands make things for Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“What terrible things will I create?”
–Wendy, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“IT DOES MY BIDDING”
–WX-78, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“I do not care for this type of magic.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Was this really a good idea?”
–Woodie, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“What shall I fashion from the shadows?”
–Maxwell, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“It doth conjure powerful, accursed things...”
–Wigfrid, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“We'd rather do crafts with paper and glue...”
–Webber, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“A place for dark concoctions.”
–Warly, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Scary hands helping?”
–Wormwood, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Might as well put the shadows to work.”
–Winona, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Those idle hands should be put to work, hyuyu!”
–Wortox, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Make me things! Now!”
–Wurt, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“It's really handy! Get it? Because it has hands?”
–Walter, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“Quite a nice change of pace to have shadows working for me.”
–Wanda, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth.
“It would be unscientific of me not to at least do some experiments.”
–Wilson, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“I have to put it together myself?”
–Willow, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“Is almost done!”
–Wolfgang, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“I suppose if I tried I could piece it together.”
–Wendy, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“ASSEMBLY REQUIRED”
–WX-78, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“It cannot be utilized until its been assembled.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“It won't do much good sitting there like that.”
–Woodie, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“There is work to be done.”
–Maxwell, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“Dare I toy with such a thing?”
–Wigfrid, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“Where should we put it?”
–Webber, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“I'll just put these pieces together, and voila!”
–Warly, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“Not done yet”
–Wormwood, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“Just needs a bit of elbow grease.”
–Winona, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“All work and no play makes for an irritable imp.”
–Wortox, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“It not ready yet.”
–Wurt, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“Don't worry, I'm great at setting things up!”
–Walter, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
“I'll have it up and running in just a tick.”
–Wanda, when examining Shadowcraft Plinth Kit.
The Shadowcraft Plinth is a Crafting Station exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. The Shadowcraft Plinth Kit used to place the Plinth can only be crafted while next to an Ancient Pseudoscience Station. It requires 5 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Dreadstone, and 1 Pure Horror to craft.
The Shadowcraft Plinth grants access to the Shadowcraft Filter while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Plinth cannot be prototyped except for Walter's Survivor Items which can be.

Void Cowl
Umbralla
Shadow Reaper
Gloomerang
Void Repair Kit
Shadow Maul
Beefalo Gloom Bell
Nightmare Saddle
Embalming Spritz

The Shadowcraft Plinth was introduced in the Terrors Below update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Shadowcraft Plinth là Trạm chế tạo độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong From Beyond. Bộ công cụ Shadowcraft Plinth được sử dụng để đặt Plinth chỉ có thể được chế tạo khi ở cạnh Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại. Nó cần 5 Nhiên liệu Ác mộng, 2 Đá Dreadstone và 1 Kinh dị thuần túy để chế tạo.

The '''Shadowcraft Plinth''' is a [[Crafting|Crafting Station]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. The '''Shadowcraft Plinth Kit''' used to place the Plinth can only be crafted while next to an [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]]. It requires 5 [[Nightmare Fuel]], 2 [[Dreadstone]], and 1 [[Pure Horror]] to craft.

The Shadowcraft Plinth grants access to the [[Shadowcraft Filter]] while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Plinth cannot be prototyped except for [[Walter]]'s Survivor Items which ''can'' be.

== Crafting Recipes ==
{{#lst:Shadowcraft Filter|Craftable Items}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Shadowcraft Plinth was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Terrors Below|Terrors Below]]'' update.
